reviews.review_title: WHY YOU SHOULD DOWNLOAD SPONGE TAG
reviews.review_description: This game is fun and I think you should play it whenever you hop on vr! And you get to chose if you want long arms or normal arms long arms you can disable [BTW IM NOT OWNER] so what would you do download sponge tag and be a clean boy or girl. Or be stinky and don't download sponge tag. (I didn't mean anything rude)
yeah this game is fire it just came out so its a bit dead but its really fun with the long arms and the music player
